name: insurance claims adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of claims payouts with internal billing
features: manual data entry for claims and payouts
